title: cassia surattensis var. suffruticosa
intro: Cassia surattensis var. suffruticosa, also known as Suffruticosa, is a variant of the Cassia surattensis plant, which is a type of shrub or small tree native to certain regions. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antidiarrheal and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat a range of health conditions. The Suffruticosa plant is said to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and providing antioxidant properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its extracts can also be used in herbal preparations such as capsules or tinctures.
